title: The Transformer Arrives: Attention Becomes the Engine
timeline_1: June 2017: self-attention becomes the center of the machine
timeline_2: 2018: bidirectional Transformer pretraining broadens the pattern
timeline_3: 2020: the same engine is ready for scale
cutoff_note: The chapter stays with pre-ChatGPT architecture.

title: The Sequence Problem: The Road Into Attention
timeline_1: 1950s-1990s: statistical language modeling learns to count sequences
timeline_2: 2013-2015: embeddings and seq2seq make words and sentences comparable
timeline_3: 2014-2016: early attention shows where recurrence strains
cutoff_note: The chapter is a compact prehistory, not a detour after ChatGPT.

title: Scaling Laws: The Bet Becomes Measurable
timeline_1: January 2020: scaling laws turn size into a measured bet
timeline_2: 2020: loss, compute, data, and parameters become a planning language
timeline_3: 2022: compute-optimal training complicates the simple bigger-is-better story
cutoff_note: Later model claims remain tied to their source dates.

title: GPT-1 to GPT-3: Pretraining Opens the Door
timeline_1: 2018: GPT-1 tests generative pretraining
timeline_2: 2019: GPT-2 makes release strategy part of the story
timeline_3: 2020-2021: GPT-3, API access, and Codex turn models into a platform
cutoff_note: The chapter ends before ChatGPT's public launch.

title: Instruction Tuning and RLHF: Alignment Enters the Product
timeline_1: 2021: human-preference methods move closer to language products
timeline_2: 2022: InstructGPT shows why a model can feel more helpful
timeline_3: 2022: system behavior becomes a product discipline
cutoff_note: The chapter treats alignment as product shaping, not as solved safety.

title: The ChatGPT Shock: The Interface Goes Public
timeline_1: November 30, 2022: ChatGPT is introduced
timeline_2: December 2022: the text box becomes the public symbol
timeline_3: Early 2023: the industry response accelerates
cutoff_note: ChatGPT is a turning point after the technical runway.

title: ChatGPT Becomes the Product Surface
timeline_1: 2023: Plus and Enterprise turn the interface into tiers
timeline_2: 2023: plugins and GPTs test tool and platform surfaces
timeline_3: 2024: GPT-4o broadens the ChatGPT interface story
cutoff_note: Mutable product pages are handled as dated snapshots, not live claims.

title: Microsoft, OpenAI, and the Cloud Bargain

title: Google and DeepMind Wake the Sleeping Giant

title: Meta, Llama, and the Open-Weight Shock

title: Failure Modes, Truth, and Trust

timeline_3: 2025-2026: evidence trails, evaluation, and deployment boundaries stay contested

title: Next Token
timeline_1: 2017-2026: the race turns architecture into infrastructure
